name: GOLFTEC Cleveland East
about: GOLFTEC Cleveland East is part of a national golf instruction and fitting franchise. The venue focuses on data-driven coaching using advanced motion measurement technology, including OPTIMOTION and high-speed video analysis, to help golfers improve their swings. They offer personalized lesson plans, club fittings, and access to training bays equipped with launch monitors. The facility is designed for structured improvement, targeting both beginners and experienced golfers seeking measurable results.
why_golfers_like_it: Professional PGA coaches with proven improvement methods
Comprehensive club fitting services using launch monitors

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC provides clubs for lessons and fittings, but you can bring your own if you prefer. They also offer club rentals and sales at their pro shop.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No food or drink service is mentioned. The venue does not appear to have a kitchen or bar, so outside food and drinks are likely not permitted.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole simulator session take?
faq.answer: The website does not specify exact timing for 18-hole simulator sessions. However, standard simulator play typically takes 2-3 hours depending on group size and pace.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: While GOLFTEC offers junior coaching programs, the specific Cleveland East location's kid-friendliness (e.g., age restrictions, family-friendly amenities) is not detailed on the provided website content.
